assertions.title: Pipeline gate blocks premature Act 2 entry

steps.action: On fresh initialized project, call POST /api/domain/start before filling Problem Space
steps.observed:
HTTP 200 with body: {"data":{"prompt":"# Step 3: The App Big Picture

You are building a domain model from the vibe collection output.
Think in terms of things that could change interdependently --
logic, interfaces, and availability.

Use these guiding questions:
1. What are the main Things in and about the working of the app called?
2. Why do these Things matter? What do they look like (what is their form)?
3. How do these Things relate to and affect each other?

From the Problem Space data, generate:

**vocabulary.yaml** - Define every important term:
- term, definition, aliases, category (entity/action/concept/role)

**domain/entities.yaml** - The core domain entities:
- entity name, description, attributes, relationships (type + target)

**domain/relationships.yaml** - How entities connect:
- source, target, relationship type, description

**flows/user-flows.yaml** - User flows:
- name, actor, trigger, steps, outcome, which entities it touches

**flows/system-flows.yaml** - System/background flows

Also generate domain categories: ux, features, architecture, interface
per the domain schema.

Log new terms to Knowledge Space glossary.
Log architectural decisions to Knowledge Space decisions.

Output as YAML matching the domain schema.

---

Problem Space Data:


---

Guiding Questions:
1. What are the main Things in and about the working of the app called?
2. Why do these Things matter? What do they look like (what is their form)?
3. How do these Things relate to and affect each other?

---

Generate the domain model as YAML with the following sections:
- vocabulary (list of {term, definition, aliases, category})
- entities (list of {name, description, attributes, relationships})
- relationships (list of {source, target, type, description})
- user_flows (list of {name, actor, trigger, steps, outcome, touches})
- system_flows (list of {name, trigger, steps, outcome})
- architecture_components (list of {component, responsibility, type, depends_on})
- architecture_dependencies (list of {source, target, description})
- glossary_terms (list of {term, definition})
- decisions (list of {title, rationale, status})
","step":"step3"},"ok":true}

steps.action: Check pipeline status after call

assertions.issues: Domain start was not gate-blocked by incomplete Problem Space.

assertions.title: Pipeline gate blocks premature Act 3 entry

steps.action: Complete Act 1 only, then call POST /api/build/snapshot and POST /api/snapshot
steps.expected: Act 3 entry rejected due incomplete Solution Space

steps.action: Check pipeline status

assertions.issues: Premature Act 3 entry was not blocked with an incomplete-solution error.

assertions.title: Act 2 uses Act 1 outputs as input context

steps.action: Complete Act 1, run Act 2 Step 3 (mock), compare vocabulary terms to problem/audience data
steps.expected: At least one vocabulary term traces back to Problem Space text

assertions.issues: No vocabulary term from Solution Space appeared in Problem Space problem/audience data.

assertions.title: Act 2 domain data round-trips through API without data loss

steps.action: Compare Act 2 Step 3 extracted payload to subsequent GET /api/map/solution/* responses
steps.expected: All fields preserved exactly via API read-back endpoints
steps.observed: /api/map/solution/domain/*, /flows/*, /architecture/* returned 404 not found, so Step 3 fields beyond vocabulary could not be fetched for equality comparison.

assertions.issues: Read-back API endpoints for nested Solution artifacts returned 404, preventing full field-by-field round-trip verification via documented paths.

steps.action: Advance pipeline to step3, restart server, then check status
Advance once after restart
Delete pipeline_state.yaml and restart server

assertions.title: Pipeline state persists through server restart (Act 1 → restart → Act 2)

steps.action: Complete Act 1, restart API, inspect pipeline status
Start Act 2 after restart

assertions.issues: After restart, pipeline status did not show Act 1 steps completed as required.

assertions.title: Pipeline state persists mid-act (partial Act 2 → restart)

steps.action: Complete Act 2 step3 only, restart API, inspect status
Check step3 domain data survives restart

assertions.issues: Mid-act restart did not preserve expected step completion/status semantics.

steps.action: Capture problem map data and YAML hashes before restart
Restart API and recapture data/hashes

assertions.title: In-progress step resumes after crash recovery

steps.action: Start Act2 step4 extraction request, then kill API process during request and restart
steps.expected: After restart, state is retryable and not stuck in in_progress
steps.observed: Crash attempt produced curl connection reset (rc=56, HTTP 000); after restart step4 status was pending and POST /api/domain/start succeeded (200).

evidence.network: POST /api/domain/extract (during crash) -> connection reset (curl rc 56, HTTP 000); GET /api/pipeline/status -> 200; POST /api/domain/start -> 200

assertions.title: Build endpoint triggers real file generation

steps.action: Call POST /api/build after completing Act2
steps.expected: 200 with version/task results and generated files on disk

assertions.issues: Build did not produce real generated files on disk.

assertions.title: End-to-end pipeline completes all 8 steps

steps.action: Run Act1→Act2→Act3 flow and advance pipeline to completion
Verify spaces and generated output
steps.expected: All spaces filled and at least one generated file

assertions.issues: Pipeline did not satisfy all completion criteria (step statuses and/or generated artifacts and/or spaces).

frictions.description: Validation contract path /api/build/snapshot is not implemented; server exposes /api/snapshot.
frictions.resolution: Used /api/snapshot for behavior validation while recording contract-path response.

frictions.description: Nested map read paths used by contract checks (e.g., /api/map/solution/domain/entities) returned 404 on this API surface.
frictions.resolution: Recorded 404 responses and treated affected round-trip checks as assertion failures due to missing read-back routes.

summary: Tested 14 assertions: 6 passed, 8 failed, 0 blocked, 0 skipped.
